reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Gate 1 (Dead Code): The flagged function get_data_column_sidecars at beacon_chain/spec/peerdas_helpers.nim:239-289 has zero non-test callers in the codebase. Grep search across all .nim files shows the function is only defined but never invoked. While the code does contain the described bug (uses cellsAndProofs[i].cells instead of cellsAndProofs[i].cells[column_index] at lines 275-276, causing incorrect cell counts), this code is unreachable and cannot affect live network operations. The 01e invariant from outputs/01e_PARTIAL_W3B4_1771748827.json (lines 756-773) requires len(sidecar.column) == len(kzg_commitments), which this dead code would violate, but unreachable code cannot cause security impact. Disputed as dead/unreachable code.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: Each sidecar must contain exactly one cell and one proof per blob in the block. (forall sidecar in sidecars: len(sidecar.column) == len(kzg_commitments) AND len(sidecar.kzg_proofs) == len(kzg_commitments))
